name: DiceBear Avatars HTTP API
description: Free avatar and profile picture API by DiceBear. Generate random user avatars and placeholder images via a simple URL with no authentication required. Supports SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP, AVIF, and JSON output formats with customizable styles and options.
